# Pull Request Template for TimedAction

## Description

<!-- Describe your changes in one or two sentences. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (API or behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation or CI
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `make ci` passes locally
- [ ] Examples compile with `make compile-examples` (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Version bumped in `library.properties` and `TimedAction.h`
